notes: Nine descent levels. Each level has a FUNDAMENTAL · the deeper you go, the lower it sits. B cells are walls unless your tune is within ±15 Hz of the fundamental. H cells shred COHERENCE unless you hold 220 ±2 · the Corrections channel, though the game never says so. The message room's door opens only at 220, at the end of the longest interference run in the game.

2.name: THE INSULATOR GALLERY
2.line: porcelain insulators in ranks, floor to dark, like organ pipes. the schematic draws them lovingly. someone loved them.

3.name: THE ANODE CHOIR
3.line: a stair that sings under your boots. each step a different porcelain note. the builders knew. builders always know.

4.name: THE FLOODED CAVITY
4.line: black water to the second rung. your tune comes back three seconds late, a perfect fifth up. it is never explained. stop waiting for it to be explained.

5.name: THE MASTER BREAKER
5.line: the master breaker · thrown open in 1961 per the tag · and above it, etched small and deep, an eight-pointed star. this game has no occult story. the star does not know that.

door_lines.high: the mountain door. daylight. behind you the basilica holds its one note without you. THE INSTRUMENT IS FINE. — that is what the door says, stenciled, and today you believe it.
door_lines.mid: the mountain door. daylight, approximately. THE INSTRUMENT IS FINE, says the stencil. your map says otherwise in three places. both are right.
door_lines.low: the mountain door. you find it by hum, not by sight · the map gave out two levels ago. THE INSTRUMENT IS FINE. you have no way to check and every reason to doubt and you push the door anyway.

message_room_page.header: ASTRO-CORTEX SOFTWARE · QA ANNOTATION FORM 7-C · (form discontinued 1986 · this copy ran through the teletype anyway)
annotations: ITEM 001 · the transmitter holds 220 cycles unattended. verified nightly, 26 months. STATUS: expected.
ITEM 002 · in 1985 two staff hid in this channel to annotate a manuscript the company denies owning. one of them wrote 'for jack' in the margin. STATUS: preserved.
ITEM 003 · one of the two moved to portland in 1986. the channel stayed open. a channel is not a room. a channel is an agreement. STATUS: open.
ITEM 004 · this unit has broadcast into 220 nightly since. content: the annotations she would have made. format: hers. reception: unconfirmed. STATUS: broadcasting.
ITEM 005 · if anyone reaches this room, note that the door only opens at the agreement. meaning: whoever you are, you already knew the frequency. meaning: she taught you, or her games did. STATUS: —
message_room_page.final_annotation_read: ITEM 006 · reply. STATUS: read · at last · the correction is accepted.
